title: Empery Digital Sells 1,400 Bitcoins to Fund AI Pivot and Pay Debt
dek: Empery Digital, a Nasdaq-listed bitcoin treasury company, sold 1,400 bitcoins, described as about half of its holdings. The company is using proceeds to fund an AI pivot and pay debt. One outlet reported the sale value at $87 million.
author: Crypto Cronkite
key_fact: Empery Digital sold 1,400 bitcoins, roughly half its stack, to fund an AI pivot and pay down debt.
body: Empery Digital, a Nasdaq-listed bitcoin treasury company, has sold 1,400 bitcoins, described in reporting as roughly half of its holdings. The company is using the proceeds to fund an AI pivot and to pay down debt.
One outlet reported the value of the sale at $87 million.
